mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM u_leaderboard_income_submission WHERE period_month = #{periodMonth} AND audit_status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT user_id AS userId, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM u_leaderboard_income_submission WHERE period_month LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '-%') AND audit_status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT user_id AS userId, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM u_leaderboard_income_submission WHERE period_month = #{periodMonth} AND audit_status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY user_id

SELECT user_id AS userId, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM u_leaderboard_income_submission WHERE period_month LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '-%') AND audit_status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY user_id
